creator: landsidel.allen@gmail.com
text:
Port net/vmware-vsphere-cli needs updated from 5.0.0 to 5.1.0

Fix: 

Update two files in the port.

Makefile changes:
  PORTVERSION= 5.1.0
  DISTREL= 780721

distinfo:
  SHA256 (VMware-vSphere-Perl-SDK-5.1.0-780721.i386.tar.gz) = 2d14c9f00b4e982a0c66ca3e95eb20411d17f71c6f50af071f30355222f2ea85
  SIZE (VMware-vSphere-Perl-SDK-5.1.0-780721.i386.tar.gz) = 25188254

Tested installation and a few vmware cli commands, all worked without issue.
How-To-Repeat: Install the port.
